description: Registry of all supported assertion matchers. The executor MUST reject any matcher name not listed here.

toHaveURL.description: Current page URL contains the given string (case-sensitive substring match).
toHaveURL.failureMessageTemplate: Expected page URL to contain "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toContainURL.description: Alias for toHaveURL — URL contains the given string.
toContainURL.failureMessageTemplate: Expected page URL to contain "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toBeVisible.description: Target element is visible in the viewport.

toBeHidden.description: Target element is hidden or not in the DOM.

toHaveText.description: Element textContent equals the given string.
toHaveText.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element text to equal "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toContainText.description: Element textContent contains the given string.
toContainText.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element text to contain "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toHaveValue.description: Input element's current value equals the given string.
toHaveValue.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element value to equal "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toHaveAttribute.description: Element attribute equals the given value.
toHaveAttribute.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element attribute "{attribute}" to equal "{value}" but got "{actual}"

toHaveCountGreaterThan.description: Number of elements matching the locator is strictly greater than the given number.

toChangeFromStored.description: Current element textContent differs from a previously captured value stored under storedKey in runtime.captured.
toChangeFromStored.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element to have changed from stored value "{stored}" but got "{actual}"

textOrAriaStateChanged.description: Element text or aria attributes differ from the snapshot auto-captured before the previous click step on the same nodeId. Falls back to storedKey if provided.
textOrAriaStateChanged.playwrightExecution: compare current aria/text state with runtime._autoCapture_{nodeId}
textOrAriaStateChanged.failureMessageTemplate: Expected element text or aria state to have changed after last action

toHaveScrollYLessThanOrEqual.description: Current window.scrollY is less than or equal to the given number.

toSatisfyAny.description: At least one sub-condition in the value array is satisfied. Supported sub-condition types: urlContains, textVisible.
toSatisfyAny.playwrightExecution: evaluate each sub-condition; pass if any returns true
toSatisfyAny.failureMessageTemplate: Expected at least one condition to be satisfied: {conditions}
